_description: Canonical BLOCK example derived from the pinned ciel_attestation_v1 fixture. The attestation fields below match crates/ciel-signer/fixtures/attestation_fixtures.json exactly. The wire.borsh_b64 field decodes to the 132 bytes in crates/ciel-signer/fixtures/ciel_attestation_v1.bin. The signature is generated by running `cargo run --package ciel-signer --example gen_pea_examples` against the test keypair documented in ../test-public-key.txt.
